commentary.text: Higgins collapses in a Vlastuin tackle 40m out on a slight angle and gets a rather soft contact free, footy gods push his set shot to the left.
#####St Kilda loses Mitch Owens but regains Jack Higgins, while the Tigers copped another two injuries last week to take their injury list to a full 18.

players.blurb_template: Rotating through mids and half forward
Starting forward on Grayand tandem rucking with De Koning
Playing a key forward role on Silvagni
Playing key defender on the resting ruck
